item.title: The S&P 500 is caught in an extremely narrow trading range. What’s happening beneath the surface could decide where the index goes next.
item.description: Software stocks have sunk. Defensive names, including consumer-staples stocks like Walmart and Costco, have rallied. Yet, despite all of the chaotic m...

item.title: These S&P 500 alternatives have shined so far this year
item.description: So far in 2026, a number of index funds that follow alternative strategies to track subsets of the S&P 500 or change the index’s weighting have perfor...

item.title: Salesforce’s record $50 billion stock-buyback plan is proving controversial on Wall Street
item.description: Salesforce is looking to buy the dip with a $50 billion share-repurchase program as the software selloff continues to send its stock falling, but Wall...

item.title: Why Nvidia’s stock is falling despite a historic earnings beat
item.description: Blockbuster earnings were perhaps anticipated as Nvidia’s big customers have already indicated how much they’ve hiked their spending on hardware.

item.title: As deal drama swirls around Warner Bros., its earnings show a declining industry
item.description: With Warner Bros. Discovery deep in negotiations to be acquired, its earnings show it is a company struggling in a fast-changing industry.
